author: han0110
content: Updated https://github.com/eth-act/zkboost/tree/master/docker/example/testnet, now it deploys `zkboost` in the same docker network `kurtosis` creates, so zkboost API should be accessible via `http://zkboost:3000`

author: taulepton_
content: Quick question for my understanding. For each prover backend (zkvm+guest), you run an independent ere service, right? That's what ethrex-zisk and reth-zisk are in the docker compose. You then have zkboost-server which acts as the gateway in front of them?
